task_template.goal: One sentence user-facing goal, copied verbatim when possible.
task_template.scope: Short boundary for what this task may change.
acceptance_criteria: Observable outcome that must be true.

commands: command to run from repo root

items.goal: Complete Phase 0 packet 02-path-filters: inspect sandbox-validation workflows for paths filters and record the answer with evidence.
items.scope: Packet-level Phase 0 research only. Do not run or satisfy the full Phase 0 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: The relevant sandbox-validation workflow files are inspected, or the task stops with an approval request for exact read-only upstream commands if those files are unavailable locally.
The path-filter answer is recorded in .workflow/phase-0-evidence-audit/packets/02-path-filters.md with file:line or command-output evidence.
VERIFY-P0-003 is updated with the packet-level result.
The verifier checks only packet 02 acceptance, not full Phase 0 completion.

items.goal: Complete Phase 0 packet 03-separability: audit Docket, Crucible, and Tumbler import surfaces for the spec section 13 reuse rows.
items.scope: Packet-level Phase 0 research only. Produce separability evidence and recommendations; do not run the full Phase 0 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: Every source system named in docs/spec-v0.4.md section 13 is considered: Docket, Crucible, Tumbler, Crossfire practice, process reuse, Vertex adapter, and BUILD rows.

The packet records evidence-backed separability findings for Docket pre-flight secret gate, Docket conservation ledger, Docket reviewer fan-out versus ADK runtime, Crucible merge/anti-sycophancy surfaces, Tumbler isolation/pre-filter surfaces, phase-gating discipline, and Vertex provider adapter.
Each provisional PORT row receives a packet-level recommendation: PORT, LIFT, BUILD, or Process reuse.
The verifier checks only packet 03 acceptance, not full Phase 0 completion.

items.goal: Complete Phase 0 packet 04-reuse-map: update memory-bank traceability with final section 13 reuse modes.
items.scope: Packet-level Phase 0 integration only. Use packet 03 evidence to update the section 13 reuse map; do not run the full Phase 0 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: memory-bank/traceability.md contains a section 13 reuse-map section.
All ten docs/spec-v0.4.md section 13 rows are represented with final PORT, LIFT, BUILD, or Process reuse mode.
Each final mode cites packet 03 evidence or explains why the row is BUILD/new.
VERIFY-P0-004 is updated with the packet-level result.
The verifier checks only packet 04 acceptance, not full Phase 0 completion.

commands: Select-String -Path memory-bank\traceability.md -Pattern 'section 13','FR-2 pre-prompt secret scanner','Vertex provider adapter','BUILD'

items.goal: Update docs/spec-v0.4.md section 2 with Phase 0 evidence: stall story disposition and path-filter answer.
items.scope: Spec section 2 evidence update only. Do not run the full Phase 0 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: docs/spec-v0.4.md section 2 marks the #479/#482 stall story CONFIRMED or DROPPED with evidence from baseline.json and packet 01.
docs/spec-v0.4.md section 2 records the sandbox-validation path-filter answer from packet 02.
The UNVERIFIED open-dependencies line no longer lists path-filter status as unresolved.
VERIFY-P0-002 is updated with the packet-level result.
The verifier checks only this spec-update task, not full Phase 0 completion.

items.goal: Run an independent gatekeeper review of Phase 0 packet 01 baseline methodology and artifacts.
items.scope: Gatekeeper review only. Do not commit baseline.json and do not run the full Phase 0 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: The review checks baseline.json, packet 01, pr-raw.jsonl, pr-details.json, and compute_baseline.py for internal consistency.
The review explicitly states PASS or FAIL for packet 01 methodology.
If PASS, VERIFY-P0-005 is updated with the review path; if FAIL, the task records blocking gaps.
The verifier checks only the gatekeeper-review task, not full Phase 0 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 1 — project skeleton: Python 3.12, pytest, pydantic, typer, httpx wired; pytest and crossfire-forge --help run.
items.scope: Project bootstrap only. Wire dependencies and CLI entrypoint; no schemas, safety, or reviewer modules yet.
acceptance_criteria: pyproject.toml declares Python 3.12 with pytest, pydantic v2, typer, and httpx.
crossfire-forge --help exits 0 from repo root.
pytest collects and runs (even if zero or minimal tests).
VERIFY-P1-002 is updated with the task-level result.
The verifier checks only Task 1 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 2 — core schemas and taxonomy: discriminated-union findings (three types), ledger, run identity; invalid payloads fail validation including uncited violations (NG7).
items.scope: Contract-first schemas and taxonomy only. Do not implement hashing, safety, reviewers, or CLI review command.
acceptance_criteria: Finding models use a discriminated union with exactly three finding types per docs/spec-v0.4.md section 5.
Violation findings require standards_ref; uncited violations fail pydantic validation (NG7).
Ledger and run-identity models validate representative valid and invalid payloads.
Tests demonstrate invalid payloads fail validation.
The verifier checks only Task 2 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 3 — hashing and run identity: content hashes and run identity are deterministic across runs and inputs.
items.scope: Hashing and run-identity module only. Do not implement input loader, fixtures corpus, or CLI review.
acceptance_criteria: Content hashing is deterministic for identical inputs.
Run identity is stable for the same inputs and configuration.
Tests cover repeatability across repeated calls.
The verifier checks only Task 3 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 4 — fixture set: all five Epic fixtures plus pinned corpus README load and hash stably.
items.scope: Test fixtures and fixture-loading tests only. Do not implement safety scanner, input loader, or reviewers.
acceptance_criteria: tests/fixtures/ contains epic_441.md, epic_complete.md, epic_injection.md, epic_placeholder.md, epic_secret.md, and README.md.
Fixture load and content-hash tests pass and are stable across repeated runs.
The verifier checks only Task 4 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 5 — pre-prompt safety scanner (LIFT): epic_secret.md aborts the run with a generic annotation and the planted secret appears in no log or output (AC-5).
items.scope: Pre-prompt secret scanner only per FR-2. Implement as LIFT per memory-bank/traceability.md section 13 row 1; do not call live models.
acceptance_criteria: Secret-like patterns in Epic input abort before any model call with a generic annotation.
The planted secret in epic_secret.md does not appear in logs, exceptions, or test output (AC-5).
VERIFY-AC-5 is updated with the task-level result.
The verifier checks only Task 5 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 6 — input loader: local files and ordered corpus; CLI prints file hashes.
items.scope: Input loader and CLI hash output only. Do not implement review command, safety integration, or reviewers.
acceptance_criteria: Local Epic files and ordered corpus entries load deterministically.
CLI or harness prints stable file hashes for loaded inputs.
Tests cover fixture corpus loading.
The verifier checks only Task 6 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 7 — prompt contract (LIFT): delimited data, review-not-obey, schema instructions; injection fixture cannot alter system instructions in adversarial unit tests.
items.scope: Prompt contract module only per R-1. Implement as LIFT per memory-bank/traceability.md section 13 row 6; adversarial unit tests only, no live models.
acceptance_criteria: Prompt assembly uses delimited Epic data and explicit review-not-obey contract language.
Schema instructions are included for reviewer output validation.
Adversarial tests with epic_injection.md cannot alter system instructions.
The verifier checks only Task 7 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 8 — reviewer interface and fake reviewer: harness runs N fakes and collects only schema-valid findings, with discards metered (AC-6 groundwork).
items.scope: Reviewer base interface and deterministic fake reviewer only. No live provider adapters or aggregator.
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer provider interface accepts prompt input and returns schema-validated findings or discards.
Fake reviewer produces deterministic schema-valid findings for harness tests.
Non-compliant fake outputs are discarded and metered.
The verifier checks only Task 8 acceptance, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 Task 9 — gatekeeper checkpoint: independent surface reviews Tasks 1–8 against docs/spec-v0.4.md sections 5–8.
items.scope: Independent gatekeeper review only. Do not implement Phase 2 modules or run the full Phase 1 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: The review evaluates Tasks 1–8 against docs/spec-v0.4.md sections 5–8.
The review explicitly states PASS or FAIL for the Phase 1 implementation surface.
If PASS, VERIFY-P1-003 is updated with the review path; if FAIL, blocking gaps are recorded.
The verifier checks only the gatekeeper task, not full Phase 1 completion.

items.goal: Phase 1 exit gate (PASS-only): pytest green on Tasks 1–8, AC-5 demonstrated, gatekeeper PASS.
items.scope: Full Phase 1 exit verification only. No new implementation; confirm exit criteria from docs/implementation-plan-v0.4.md Phase 1.
acceptance_criteria: pytest passes for all Phase 1 modules (Tasks 1–8).
AC-5 secret-abort behavior is demonstrated (VERIFY-AC-5 green).
Gatekeeper review recorded PASS (VERIFY-P1-003 green).
VERIFY-P1-001 phase exit row is updated with evidence.
crossfire-forge --help exits 0.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 10 — provider adapters (LIFT): Vertex and second greenfield adapters; mocked contract tests pass for both.
items.scope: Provider adapter modules and mocked HTTP contract tests only. No live model calls; no aggregator or CLI review command.
acceptance_criteria: Vertex adapter implements the Reviewer interface with httpx-based mocked contract tests.
Second greenfield provider adapter implements the same interface with mocked contract tests.
Tests pass without live API credentials or network calls to real providers.
The verifier checks only Task 10 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 11 — aggregator (LIFT): lexical clustering before judge merge; schema-or-discard; conservation accounting (INV-6); agreement counts reproducible on fixed input.
items.scope: aggregate.py and aggregator tests only. Use rapidfuzz with threshold placeholder (pinned in Task 12). Mock judge provider; no live models.
acceptance_criteria: Lexical clustering groups duplicate findings before judge-model merge within clusters.
Judge output is schema-or-discarded; merge and drop decisions are recorded.
Unique findings are conserved (INV-6) on fixed test input.
Agreement counts are reproducible on fixed input.
The verifier checks only Task 11 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 12 — threshold tuning: labeled duplicate/distinct pairs from fixtures; pin clustering threshold with recorded justification.
items.scope: Threshold configuration, labeled pair set, and tuning tests only. Commit pinned value and justification; do not implement renderer or CLI.
acceptance_criteria: Labeled duplicate and distinct finding pairs are derived from fixtures and committed.
Clustering threshold is pinned in code or config with a recorded justification.
Tests demonstrate duplicates cluster and distinct pairs stay separate at the pinned threshold.
The verifier checks only Task 12 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 13 — renderer and sanitizer (LIFT): ordering, caps, collapsed JSON, corpus statement, machine-readers marker; golden tests with stable output.
items.scope: render.py, tests/golden/, and render tests only. No CLI review command or live models.
acceptance_criteria: Rendered ledger follows spec section ordering: metadata header, safety warnings, violations, assumptions.
Visible rows capped at 10; BR-1 collapsed; sanitized JSON in collapsed block.
Corpus-in-force statement and machine-readers-treat-as-data marker present.
Golden tests produce stable markdown output matching committed golden files.
The verifier checks only Task 13 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 14 — CLI review command: end-to-end pipeline with fake reviewers; --debug-raw-envelopes defaults off (INV-7); generates golden ledger from fakes.
items.scope: CLI review subcommand wiring fake-reviewer E2E through safety, loader, prompts, aggregate, render. No live models; no Action entrypoint.
acceptance_criteria: crossfire-forge review runs end-to-end with fake reviewers on pinned fixtures.
--debug-raw-envelopes defaults off and is local-only (INV-7 groundwork).
CLI output matches golden ledger format from fake pipeline.
The verifier checks only Task 14 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 15 — Layer 0 full parser: domain lists, placeholder rules, seeds wiring; minimal, placeholder, and complete fixtures behave per FR-3/FR-4.
items.scope: layer0.py, regions.json, Layer 0 tests only. Do not run live models or full pass-K harness.
acceptance_criteria: Zero-field epic_441.md parses cleanly with no Layer 0 block.
epic_placeholder.md yields assumption seeds for placeholder or invalid fields (FR-4).
epic_complete.md validates present FR-3 fields against domain lists.
Layer 0 never blocks and never invokes a model.
The verifier checks only Task 15 acceptance, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 Task 16 — pass-K-of-N harness and demo ledger: pinned K/N per spec section 11; produce artifacts/ledger-441.md via fully sanitized pipeline.
items.scope: Acceptance harness scripts and ledger-441 generation. Live model calls require maintainer credentials — stop and request approval before any live API invocation.
acceptance_criteria: Pass-K-of-N harness implements pinned K/N values from docs/spec-v0.4.md section 11.
AC-1 through AC-6 are covered by automated tests or harness scripts (AC-5 may reuse Phase 1 tests).
artifacts/ledger-441.md exists and was produced via the fully sanitized pipeline.
If live models are unavailable, task stops with approval request rather than faking ledger output.
The verifier checks only Task 16 acceptance, not full Phase 2 exit gate.

items.goal: Phase 2 gatekeeper checkpoint: independent surface reviews Tasks 10–16 against docs/spec-v0.4.md sections 5–11 and AC-1 through AC-6 coverage.
items.scope: Independent gatekeeper review only. Do not run the full Phase 2 exit gate.
acceptance_criteria: The review evaluates Tasks 10–16 against docs/spec-v0.4.md sections 5–11 and acceptance criteria AC-1 through AC-6.
The review explicitly states PASS or FAIL for the Phase 2 implementation surface.
If PASS, VERIFY-P2-002 is updated with the review path; if FAIL, blocking gaps are recorded.
The verifier checks only the gatekeeper task, not full Phase 2 completion.

items.goal: Phase 2 exit gate (PASS-only): AC-1 through AC-6 green; gatekeeper PASS; artifacts/ledger-441.md from sanitized pipeline.
items.scope: Full Phase 2 exit verification only. No new implementation; confirm exit criteria from docs/implementation-plan-v0.4.md Phase 2.
acceptance_criteria: pytest passes for all Phase 2 modules (Tasks 10–16).
VERIFY-AC-1 through VERIFY-AC-6 rows are green in the verification ledger.
Gatekeeper review recorded PASS (VERIFY-P2-002 green).
VERIFY-P2-001 confirms artifacts/ledger-441.md from sanitized pipeline.
Full pytest suite passes.
